data.content: Shipment complete. Fast-forwarded local main from 2525f03c to 7465239565c37d13f3e1ac719b9d508a744c45df and pushed to origin/main using HEAD:main. Local merged-main gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Remote verification passed: GitHub CI run 25425297594 succeeded and Coverage Badge run 25425297575 succeeded. CI emitted coverage-regression warnings for line/function/statement percentages, but the remote workflow concluded successfully.
